beats.activity: Wake up, coffee, morning routine in quiet house.
beats.reasoning: Low energy yesterday (40/100) means a gentle start—coffee ritual and stillness before the day. Transit strike means no rush to leave early.

beats.activity: Drive to work via surface streets; transit strike forces car route.
beats.reasoning: ER shift starts early; metro buses and Light Rail down until 4pm, so driving is necessary. Surface streets add buffer time but Lucia knows the back routes well.

beats.activity: ER shift: triaging, patient care, charting.
beats.reasoning: Typical morning ER shift. Mild weather and no major incidents expected, so steady but not catastrophic day. Lucia's energy is recovering after yesterday's long shift.

beats.activity: Lunch break at Ballard Coffee, watch the light, decompress.
beats.reasoning: Lucia gravitates to Ballard Coffee after shifts for ritual and calm. Mild weather makes it pleasant to sit and watch the street. Close to hospital via surface streets.

beats.activity: Drive back to Harborview to finish shift.
beats.reasoning: Short drive back; transit still down, so car is only option. Tight window before returning to ER work.

beats.activity: Finish ER shift; transit strike ends at 4pm.
beats.reasoning: Afternoon portion of shift. Transit strike lifts at 4pm but Lucia is already committed to staying until end of shift. Partly cloudy weather is pleasant for commute home.

beats.activity: Drive home via I-5 now that transit is restored; could take Link or bus but car is faster.
beats.reasoning: Post-shift commute. Transit strike is over, but driving home is quicker after a long day. Mild weather and no major traffic expected. Lucia is ready to decompress.

beats.activity: Hit the gym: weights and treadmill to shake off the shift.
beats.reasoning: Fitness obsession and post-shift ritual. Walking distance from home. Mild weather and golden evening light make this perfect timing. Lucia does this most days after work to reset.

world_event_prompt: Mild, partly cloudy Thursday, high of 68F. Citywide transit strike: all Metro buses and Link Light Rail suspended until 4pm. Rideshare surge pricing in effect.
